# fleetdm_fleets (Data Source)

Retrieves a list of all FleetDM fleets.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Get all fleets
data "fleetdm_fleets" "all" {}

# Output all fleet names
output "all_fleet_names" {
  value = [for fleet in data.fleetdm_fleets.all.fleets : fleet.name]
}

# Find fleets with hosts
output "fleets_with_hosts" {
  value = [for fleet in data.fleetdm_fleets.all.fleets : fleet.name if fleet.host_count > 0]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `fleets` (Attributes List) The list of fleets. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--fleets))

<a id="nestedatt--fleets"></a>
### Nested Schema for `fleets`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String) A description of the fleet.
- `host_count` (Number) The number of hosts in the fleet.
- `id` (Number) The unique identifier of the fleet.
- `name` (String) The name of the fleet.
- `user_count` (Number) The number of users in the fleet.
